items.title: TechCrunch is heading to Tokyo — and bringing the Startup Battlefield with it
items.title_zh: TechCrunch将前往东京，并带来创业战场

Expect live demos of humanoid robots, sessions on autonomous driving's software revolution, deep dives into cyber defense and climate tech, and candid conversations about how AI is rewriting the global music and anime industries.

items.title: Now the FAA says gamers are the answer to its air traffic controller shortage

items.summary: The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) has struggled for years to have enough air traffic controllers to address shortages, with the US Government Accountability Office (GAO) saying in January that the number of people in the job in the US has declined by around 6 percent "in the last decade." Now the Trump administration is rolling […]

items.title: 20-year-old man arrested for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at Sam Altman’s house

The incident was caught on surveillance cameras shortly before 7AM ET. Later that morning, someone matching the suspect's description was seen making threats outside OpenAI's […]

After making a high-speed re-entry through the atmosphere, […]

items.title: Microsoft finally lets Windows 11 testers unlock experimental features without ViVeTool

The changes are part of making the Windows Insider Program (WIP) less confusing, with Dev and Canary testing rings simplified into a new Experimental Channel alongside a refresh of the existing Beta Channel. items.title: Amazon Luna axes third-party game purchases

items.summary: Amazon Luna announced a big change on Friday that will prevent players from purchasing third-party games and subscriptions. The cloud gaming service will remove previously purchased games on June 10th, 2026, though they'll still be available to play on other platforms through the EA, GOG, or Ubisoft accounts players used when purchasing the title. In […]

But the story is very different in one of the many viral, AI-generated Lego videos that have been produced by Iranian content creation group Explosive Media in the weeks since the US […]

items.title: Congress can finally close a mass surveillance loophole — but will they?
items.title_zh: 国会终于可以弥补大规模监控漏洞--但他们会吗？
items.summary: A warrantless wiretapping authority that has facilitated surveillance for decades is up for renewal in Congress. Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (FISA), last reauthorized in 2024, is set to expire on April 20th. A bipartisan coalition of progressive Democrats and members of the hard-right Freedom Caucus say it's long overdue for reform. […]

items.summary: The male wolf, named Neukgu, escaped a zoo in the central city of Daejeon on Wednesday, officials said.

items.title: Melania Trump's speech propels Epstein crisis back to forefront

items.summary: She has now placed herself squarely into the Epstein story and at odds with the administration, which wants to end the investigation.

items.title: BBB 26: Gabriela, Leandro e Marciele estão no paredão; vote na enquete
items.title_zh: BBB 26 ： Gabriela、Leandro和Marciele在墙上；在民意调查中投票
items.summary: Gabriela Saporito, Leandro Rocha, o Boneco, e Marciele Albuquerque se enfrentam no paredão da semana do BBB 26 (Globo) e uma das sisters será eliminada na tarde de domingo (12), às 17h30, antes do Domingão com Huck. Leia mais (04/10/2026 - 23h29)

items.title: BBB 26: Ana Paula sugere reunir todo o elenco da temporada para prevenir cancelamentos
items.title_zh: BBB 26 ： Ana Paula建议将整个赛季的演员聚集在一起，以防止取消预订
items.summary: A jornalista Ana Paula Renault, em conversa com Milena Moreira, Juliano Floss e Leandro Boneco, sugeriu uma reunião de todos os 25 participantes do BBB 26 (Globo) após a final do programa. Leia mais (04/10/2026 - 23h04)

items.title: China testa ruptura com os EUA ao fazer aposta doméstica de IA
items.title_zh: 中国通过国内人工智能赌注测试与美国的破裂
items.summary: A startup chinesa DeepSeek anunciou nesta semana que vai reescrever do zero o código de seu próximo modelo de inteligência artificial (conhecido até agora como V4) para funcionar exclusivamente em chips da Huawei, abandonando a americana Nvidia. A decisão é a aposta mais explícita já feita por um laboratório de ponta chinês de que o silício nacional já é capaz de sustentar o estado da arte da IA. Leia mais (04/10/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Autor discute como a atenção se tornou recurso mais disputado do mundo e alvo de 'canto das sereias'
items.title_zh: 作者讨论了注意力如何成为世界上最具争议的资源和“警笛之歌”的目标
items.summary: A verdade costuma ser algo complexo que não se resume a uma notificação de "push", enviada para a tela de bloqueio do celular. Mas, na era da comunicação via redes sociais, proliferam os chamados de "veja", "confira", "acompanhe", na tentativa de capturar alguma parte dos 86.400 segundos que preenchem o dia do ser humano. Leia mais (04/10/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: China derruba postagens contra o casamento e a maternidade em novo passo de campanha de censura
items.title_zh: 中国在新的审查活动步骤中取消反婚姻和反生育职位
items.summary: Uma comediante chinesa, Xiao Pa, estava com febre e decidiu compartilhar o problema em sua conta na rede social Weibo. Adicionou à publicação que, se tivesse marido e filhos, provavelmente teria que se escorar na parede e cozinhar mesmo doente. Leia mais (04/10/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Semana Paulistana do Vinho celebra a bebida em restaurantes, parques e wine-bars da cidade
items.title_zh: Semana Paulistana do Vinho在城市的餐厅、公园和葡萄酒吧庆祝饮品
items.summary: A primeira edição da Semana Paulistana do Vinho, em São Paulo, vai até o dia 21 de abril com mais de 200 atividades ligadas à bebida. Leia mais (04/10/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Petistas criticam STF para reduzir desgaste com caso Master e quebrar monopólio da direita
items.title_zh: Petistas批评STF通过Master案例减少磨损并打破右翼垄断
items.summary: As críticas do presidente Lula (PT) e de alguns de seus aliados ao STF (Supremo Tribunal Federal) nos últimos dias foram uma forma do grupo político tentar conter o desgaste político causado pelo escândalo do Banco Master. Leia mais (04/10/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Mostra revê Paulo Mendes da Rocha e sua arquitetura a partir de pautas ambientais
items.title_zh: 展览回顾了Paulo Mendes da Rocha及其基于环境指南的建筑
items.summary: Uma gangorra rosa atravessa um muro que separa os Estados Unidos e o México. A cor vibrante desafia a a barreira enferrujada e conecta populações em um exercício lúdico. Desenvolvida por Rael San Fratello, a performance filmada reflete ideais de Paulo Mendes da Rocha, arquiteto brasileiro que pauta a exposição "A Terceira Margem da Cidade", em cartaz no MuBE, o Museu Brasileiro da Escultura e da Ecologia. Leia mais (04/10/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Governo Lula gasta R$ 2 milhões com cachês para influenciadores e artistas
items.title_zh: 卢拉政府花费200万雷亚尔用于支付网红和艺术家的费用
items.summary: O governo Lula (PT) pagou cerca de R$ 2 milhões para influenciadores digitais e artistas participarem de campanhas publicitárias desde 2025, quando Sidônio Palmeira assumiu o comando da Secom (Secretaria de Comunicação Social). Leia mais (04/10/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Stefano Mancuso, referência no estudo das plantas, vem pela primeira vez ao Brasil
items.title_zh: 植物研究中的参考人物Stefano Mancuso首次来到巴西
items.summary: Um dos intelectuais mais influentes do mundo no campo da botânica, o italiano Stefano Mancuso virá pela primeira vez ao Brasil para realizar uma série de eventos ao redor do país, de 2 a 10 de junho. Leia mais (04/10/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Iran, US to hold peace talks overshadowed by mutual mistrust
items.title_zh: 伊朗、美国将在相互不信任的阴影下举行和平谈判
items.summary: Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, whose country host the negotiation, said making progress at the Islamabad talks would be hard work.

items.title: Three dead, five missing as fishing boat catches fire in Malacca Strait
items.title_zh: 三人死亡，五人失踪，因为渔船在马六甲海峡着火
items.summary: Three fishermen died in the accident while 13 others were picked up by the KM Mandiri, which was fishing nearby when the fire broke out.

items.title: ADB predicts slowing Asia growth as MidEast war takes toll
items.title_zh: 亚行预测，随着中东战争造成的损失，亚洲经济增长将放缓
items.summary: The Middle East war is expected to drag on Asia's economies over this year and next, the Asian Development Bank warned Friday, as it predicted growth to slow to 5.1 percent across the world’s most populous region.

items.title: Government flags sanctions as Google resists under-16 ban
items.title_zh: 政府标记制裁，因为谷歌抵制16岁以下的禁令
items.summary: The government has issued a warning to tech giant Google for failing to comply with a newly enacted social media ban for children, while Meta has moved to meet the regulation by raising the minimum user age to 16 across Instagram, Facebook and Threads.

items.title: Indonesia leads UN call for action after peacekeeper deaths in Lebanon
items.title_zh: 在黎巴嫩维和人员死亡后，印度尼西亚率先呼吁联合国采取行动
items.summary: Indonesia has rallied more than 70 countries to condemn “in the strongest terms” the attacks on United Nations peacekeepers in Lebanon, calling for urgent UN investigation and accountability following deadly incidents that killed Indonesian personnel.

items.title: Splashdown of Artemis II astronauts concludes 10-day moon mission
items.title_zh: 阿尔忒弥斯二号宇航员坠落月球完成10天登月任务
items.summary: NASA's gumdrop-shaped Orion capsule, dubbed Integrity, parachuted gently into the sea off the Southern California coast shortly after 5 p.m. PT, concluding a mission that took the astronauts deeper into space than anyone had flown before.

items.title: Analysis: BI tightens USD access as rupiah pressures mount
items.title_zh: 分析：随着印尼盾压力的增加， BI收紧了美元准入
items.summary: With the rupiah continuing to weaken amid an oil and gas shock linked to the United States-Israeli war on Iran, Bank Indonesia (BI) has halved the threshold for monthly purchases of US dollars (USD) using rupiah. The move is intended to give the central bank more room to intervene in the currency market and safeguard foreign exchange reserves, particularly as pressures intensify from ongoing oil and gas supply disruptions. However, the policy may carry unintended consequences for the real economy.

items.title: Prabowo directs seized money toward school repairs
items.title_zh: Prabowo指示将没收的钱用于学校维修
items.summary: Assets recovered and transferred to the state since President Prabowo Subianto took office one and a half years ago totaled Rp 31.3 trillion, which the President said could be used to repair 34,000 damaged schools or 500,000 houses for low-income families.

items.title: Small businesses feel the pinch of rising plastic costs
items.title_zh: 小型企业感受到塑料成本上升的压力
items.summary: Yayat Ruchyat, a tofu and tempeh producer in Parepare, South Sulawesi, said the surge in plastic prices has placed him in a difficult position: raising prices could weaken consumers’ purchasing power and hurt sales, while keeping prices unchanged would further erode his already thin margins.

items.title: Under one moon
items.title_zh: 一月之下
items.summary: “Look again at that dot. That’s here. That’s home. That’s us. On it everyone you love, everyone you know, everyone you ever heard, every human being who ever was, lived out their lives […] every hunter and forager, every hero and coward, every creator and destroyer of civilization, every corrupt politician, every ‘supreme leader’.”

items.title: Nasa’s Artemis II crew returns to Earth after record Moon mission
items.title_zh: 美国国家航空航天局的阿尔忒弥斯二号机组人员在创纪录的月球
items.summary: Artemis II astronauts have successfully returned to Earth, splashing down near San Diego after a groundbreaking lunar flyby. This 10-day mission tested deep space systems and set a new record for human distance from our planet. The crew's return at incredible speeds marks a significant milestone, paving the way for future lunar landings.

items.title: ‘Strait of Hormuz will open, with or without Iran’: Trump ahead of peace talks
items.title_zh: “霍尔木兹海峡将开放，无论有没有伊朗” ：特朗普在和平谈判之前

items.title: Bumrah or Hazlewood, doesn't matter: Sooryavanshi says 'play the ball, not bowler'
items.title_zh: Bumrah或Hazlewood无关紧要： Sooryavanshi说“打球，而不是投球手”
items.summary: Sooryavanshi scored 78 off 26 balls as Rajasthan Royals (RR) chased down Royal Challengers Bengaluru’s (RCB) total of 201 with two overs remaining.

items.title: 'Intended to marry minor': Man, 9 others held for murder of pregnant wife, 2 daughters
items.title_zh: “打算嫁给未成年人” ：男子，另外9人因谋杀怀孕妻子而被拘留， 2个女儿
items.summary: A man has been arrested for allegedly drowning his pregnant wife and two daughters in a swimming pool after discovering the unborn child was female. He reportedly intended to marry a minor to father a male heir. Police also arrested ten others for facilitating an illegal prenatal sex determination test.

items.title: Fire at Sam Altman’s home after Molotov attack; OpenAI HQ threatened
items.title_zh: 自制燃烧弹袭击后山姆·奥尔特曼的家中发生火灾； OpenAI总部受到威胁
items.summary: A 20-year-old man was apprehended after allegedly hurling a Molotov cocktail at Sam Altman's San Francisco residence, igniting an exterior gate. Shortly after, he reportedly threatened to torch OpenAI's headquarters. Police swiftly responded to both incidents, detaining the suspect. OpenAI expressed gratitude for the rapid police response and support in ensuring employee safety.

items.title: Why is Iran not reopening the Strait of Hormuz? Unseen dangers at sea
items.title_zh: 为什么伊朗不重新开放霍尔木兹海峡？海上看不见的危险
items.summary: The Strait of Hormuz remains a critical flashpoint, with Iran's inability to fully reopen it due to naval mines posing a significant threat to global trade.  Technical limitations and ongoing security risks complicate mine-clearing efforts.  US President Trump has rejected Iran's proposed transit fees, insisting the waterway is international.

items.title: MAGAlomania: Melania denies Epstein ties as Trump trashes (Tucker and other) talking heads
items.title_zh: MAGAlomania ：梅拉尼娅否认与爱泼斯坦的关系，因为特朗普诋毁（塔克和其他人）的谈话头脑

items.title: Yashwant Varma's resignation may open graft-probe window
items.title_zh: Yashwant Varma的辞职可能会打开移植探针窗口
items.summary: Justice Yashwant Varma resigned, avoiding a parliamentary removal debate. His resignation follows a probe into a large cash discovery at his official residence. An inquiry committee corroborated the findings and the subsequent mysterious disappearance of the money. This incident intensified discussions on judicial integrity and judge appointments.

items.title: Two years after Google CEO Sundar Pichai’s ‘Code Red’, Satya Nadella orders AI overhaul
items.title_zh: 谷歌首席执行官桑达尔·皮查伊（ Sundar Pichai ）的“红色代码”两年后，萨蒂亚·纳德拉（ Satya Nadella
items.summary: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella has initiated a 'Copilot code red' to enhance AI performance and user experience, aiming to boost investor confidence amidst intense competition.  The company is allocating significant cloud capacity to Copilot development, with analysts suggesting Azure can still exceed expectations due to growing demand and pricing.

items.title: ‘Dhurandhar 2’ day 23 box office: Film earns Rs 6.7 crore Friday
items.title_zh: “Dhurandhar 2”第23天票房：电影周五收入6.7亿卢比
items.summary: Ranveer Singh's spy drama 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' achieved massive box office success, becoming one of his highest earners. Despite a recent dip in daily collections after its 21st day, the film's overall domestic net collection has surpassed Rs 1,055 crore, with worldwide figures nearing Rs 1700 crore.

items.title: 10 Dead, Mostly From Punjab, As Tourist Boat Overturns In Yamuna In UP's Vrindavan
items.title_zh: 10人死亡，主要来自旁遮普邦，因为游船在UP的Vrindavan的Yamuna翻船
items.summary: The tourists were part of a larger group of around 150 pilgrims from Ludhiana and Muktsar.

items.title: 'User Data Not Accessed': OpenAI Identifies Security Issue
items.title_zh: “未访问用户数据” ： OpenAI识别安全问题
items.summary: OpenAI said no evidence that its software was altered.

items.title: Trump's Veep JD Vance Has "High Risk, High Reward" Job At Hand: Peace Talks With Iran
items.title_zh: 特朗普的Veep JD Vance拥有“高风险，高回报”的工作：与伊朗的和平谈判
items.summary: JD Vance will be in Pakistan to turn the shaky Iran ceasefire into a lasting peace deal.

items.title: 2,760 Degrees Celsius, 40,000 Kmph: Artemis II Re-entry Had NASA On The Edge
items.title_zh: 2760摄氏度， 40,000公里/小时：阿尔忒弥斯II重返大气层，美国宇航局即将到来
items.summary: The Artemis II mission splashed down safely in the Pacific Ocean early on Saturday.

items.title: Prince Harry Sued By Charity He Set Up In Africa To Honour Mother Princess Diana
items.title_zh: 哈里王子被他在非洲设立的慈善机构起诉，以纪念戴安娜王妃
items.summary: Prince Harry helped found the Sentebale charity in 2006

items.title: Artemis II Astronauts Return After Historic Moon Trip, 4 Lakh km From Earth
items.title_zh: 阿尔忒弥斯二号宇航员在历史悠久的月球之旅后返回，距离地球4万公里
items.summary: NASA's Orion spacecraft carrying Artemis II astronauts splashed down in Pacific Ocean

items.title: Key US-Iran Talks In Pakistan Today Could End The War Or Ramp It Up
items.title_zh: 今天美伊在巴基斯坦的关键会谈可能会结束战争或加剧战争
items.summary: Washington and Tehran are scheduled to sit down for their first session in Islamabad on Saturday morning.

items.title: Sam Altman's California Home Hit By Molotov Cocktail, Suspect Arrested
items.title_zh: 山姆·奥尔特曼在加利福尼亚州的家被莫洛托夫鸡尾酒击中，嫌疑人被捕
items.summary: A person was arrested by San Francisco police for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's home and for making threats outside the artificial intelligence startup's headquarters.

items.title: US-Israel-Iran War LIVE Updates: US-Iran To Hold Key Peace Talks In Islamabad Today
items.title_zh: 美国-以色列-伊朗战争现场更新：美国-伊朗将于今天在伊斯兰堡举行关键的和平谈判
items.summary: US-Iran to hold peace talks in Islamabad today.

items.title: Kamala Harris Says She Might Run For President Again In 2028
items.title_zh: 卡马拉·哈里斯（ Kamala Harris ）表示，她可能会在2028年再次竞选总统
items.summary: Kamala Harris lost her 2024 presidential bid to President Donald Trump.

items.title: 米とイラン きょうパキスタンで協議予定も 双方主張は対立
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗定于今天在巴基斯坦举行会谈，他们的主张存在分歧。
items.summary: イラン情勢をめぐるアメリカとイランの協議が11日、仲介国パキスタンの首都イスラマバードで予定されています。アメリカのバンス副大統領がイスラマバードに向けて出発した一方、イラン側はイスラエルによるレバノンへの攻撃停止が協議を行う条件だと主張していて、予定どおり協議が行われるかは予断を許さない状況です。

items.title: 月探査「アルテミス計画」宇宙船 太平洋に着水し地球に帰還
items.title_zh: 月球探测“阿尔忒弥斯项目”航天器在太平洋着陆并返回地球
items.summary: アメリカが主導する国際月探査プロジェクト「アルテミス計画」で、宇宙飛行士を乗せて月の裏側を回り込むようにして飛行した宇宙船は日本時間の11日午前9時すぎ、太平洋に着水して無事に地球に帰還しました。

items.title: 東～西日本 気温上昇 熱中症に注意 北日本は荒天の見込み
items.title_zh: 日本东西部中暑警报日本北部恶劣天气可能升温
items.summary: 東日本と西日本は11日、広い範囲で晴れて気温が上がり、季節外れの暑さとなるところもある見込みで、熱中症に注意が必要です。一方、北日本では風が強まり荒れた天気となる見込みで、気象庁は暴風に警戒するよう呼びかけています。

items.title: イチローさんの功績たたえる銅像お披露目 ハプニングにも笑顔
items.title_zh: 一郎的著名雕像揭幕时也能微笑
items.summary: 大リーグ、マリナーズなどで活躍し、去年、日本選手初のアメリカ野球殿堂入りを果たしたイチローさんの功績をたたえる銅像がシアトルでお披露目され、イチローさんが「これがあることによっていつの時代も思い出してもらえる」と喜びを話しました。

items.title: 変わる入社式 企業のねらいは 新卒の求人倍率と離職率【Q＆A】
items.title_zh: 不断变化的入职公司的目标是增加招聘岗位数量和应届毕业生的离职率[Q&A]
items.summary: 社会人としての一歩を踏み出す入社式を型どおりのものではなくイベント形式にすることでみんなの記憶に残るものにし、さらに、新入社員の退職の減少にもつなげているという会社があります。

items.title: 働く人の健康増進 文科省が企業の取り組みに財政支援を検討
items.title_zh: 教育、文化、体育、科学和技术部考虑为促进工人健康的企业举措提供财政支持
items.summary: 成長分野で人材を育成し確保していく一環として、文部科学省は働く人たちの健康増進が生産性の向上と経済成長につながるとして、従業員の運動やスポーツの推進に取り組む企業に財政支援を行うことを検討しています。

items.title: 自民“時間外労働 月45時間以内求める労基署の指導見直しを”
items.title_zh: 自雇人士“审核劳工基金会每月45小时内要求加班的指导意见”
items.summary: 労働時間規制をめぐり、自民党は、特別条項付きの労使協定のもとで働きたい人が柔軟に働ける環境を整えたいとして、時間外労働を月45時間以内に削減するよう一律に求める労働基準監督署の指導を見直すことなどを盛り込んだ提言案をまとめました。

items.title: PWS Korea wrestles its way into spotlight
items.title_zh: PWS韩国站上聚光灯
items.summary: Pro Wrestling Society (PWS) Korea is aiming to build on a breakout year as it prepares to welcome thousands of fans for Wrestle Nation 2 on May 9. The flagship event last May drew around 3,000 spectators, a milestone that Shiho, founder and director of PWS, said is rare across the global independent professional wrestling scene. Replicating that number would place PWS among a small group of promoters in Asia able to consistently attract crowds of that size, he added. “We are trying to become the center of pro wrestling in the Asian region,” he told The Korea Times in an interview. The growth follows a major overhaul in recent years, as PWS shifted toward a more systematic approach to pro wrestling. Shiho, who debuted as a pro wrestler in 2012, said the changes followed creative differences with earlier wrestlers, prompting a reset to rebuild the group’s roster around a more unified vision. Narrative-driven storylines Shiho describes pro wrestling as closer to film or theater, with tighter control over characters, storylines and presentation than a traditional sport. “If you want to

items.title: YongsanCats saves hundreds of felines from disappearing streets in Hannam New Town redevelopment zone
items.title_zh: 龙山猫从汉南新城重建区消失的街道上拯救了数百只猫科动物
items.summary: Construction equipment smashes down old brick buildings and scrapes into the exposed earth underneath, making way for Hannam New Town, a massive redevelopment project located between central Seoul's multicultural Itaewon area and the Han River. As demolition is nearly complete in Zone 3, the first of five adjacent redevelopment zones in the area, residents of Zone 2 are being pushed out in the latest wave of evictions. Amid the destruction, Julie Choi, the operator of YongsanCats, an animal welfare community active in the area, warns that large-scale redevelopment of the neighborhood affects more than just its human residents. Choi, who lives in another part of Yongsan District, estimates she has rescued more than 200 cats from the path of demolition in the area since 2024. "I started because I could not ignore what I knew these cats were facing," she told The Korea Times. "I also wanted to help create an environment in which ordinary people feel they can take responsibility for even one life." Now the animal shelter, where her rescues live while awaiting a foster or forever home, faces

items.title: Saudi Arabia forecasts heavy rain until Tuesday, Civil Defense issues alert
items.title_zh: 沙特阿拉伯预测大雨将持续至周二，民防问题警报
items.summary: RIYADH — The National Center for Meteorology has forecast moderate to heavy rainfall across most regions of Saudi Arabia starting Friday and continuing through Tuesday.Affected areas include Asir, Jazan, Najran, Al-Baha, Makkah, Riyadh, the Eastern Province, Qassim, and the Northern Borders.The center urged the public to follow official weather updates and alerts through its website, social media platforms, and the Anwaa app.The General Directorate of Civil Defense also called on residents to exercise caution, remain in safe locations, avoid flood-prone areas and valleys, and refrain from swimming in them.According to the forecast, Makkah region will experience moderate to heavy rainfall that may lead to flash floods, hail, and strong downdraft winds causing dust and reduced visibility, affecting areas including Turbah, Al-Moya, Al-Khurmah, Ranyah, Taif, Maysan, Adham, Al-Ardiyat, and lighter rainfall in Al-Laith, Al-Qunfudhah, Makkah city, Al-Jumum, Bahrah, and Al-Kamil.Riyadh region is also expected to see moderate to heavy rainfall with similar weather conditions, impacting Wadi Al-Dawasir, Al-Sulayyil, Al-Aflaj, Riyadh city, Al-Dilam, Al-Muzahimiyah, Dhurma, Al-Qiddiya, Diriyah, Hotat Bani Tamim, Al-Hariq, Al-Kharj, Marat, Afif, Al-Dawadmi, Al-Quwayiyah, and Al-Rayn, with lighter rainfall in Rumah, Shaqra, Al-Majma’ah, Al-Zulfi, Al-Ghat, and Thadiq.Moderate to heavy rain is also expected in Asir, Jazan, Najran, Al-Baha, and the Eastern Province, while lighter rainfall is forecast for Qassim, the Northern Borders, and Madinah.Authorities stressed the importance of adhering to safety instructions and avoiding risky areas during the weather conditions.

items.title: Saudi woman saves toddler after cardiac arrest at Quba Mosque
items.title_zh: 沙特女子在库巴清真寺心脏骤停后拯救幼儿
items.summary: MADINAH — A Saudi woman helped save the life of a 1.5-year-old girl after she suffered cardiac and respiratory arrest while at Quba Mosque.The Saudi Red Crescent Authority in Madinah said the woman intervened immediately before ambulance teams arrived, performing cardiopulmonary resuscitation (CPR) based on prior first aid training she received through the authority’s programs.Her prompt response significantly increased the child’s chances of survival.Upon arrival, emergency teams completed the required medical procedures in line with approved protocols, resulting in the restoration of the child’s pulse and full recovery of consciousness.The authority said the case highlights the critical importance of the first minutes in dealing with emergency situations and the vital role of community members as first responders.It added that early intervention can make a decisive difference before specialized teams arrive.The authority reaffirmed its ongoing efforts to raise awareness and provide first aid training, stressing that timely action can save lives.

items.title: Saudi, Spanish FMs discuss over phone repercussions of regional situation
items.title_zh: 沙特、西班牙FM通过电话讨论地区局势的影响
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi Minister of Foreign Affairs Prince Faisal bin Farhan received on Thursday a phone call from Spanish Foreign Minister José Manuel Álvarez. During the call, they discussed developments in the region and their repercussions on security and stability, as well as the efforts being made in this regard.

items.title: Prince Faisal, Marco Rubio discuss latest regional developments in phone call
items.title_zh: 费萨尔亲王与马可·卢比奥讨论地区通话的最新发展
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi Minister of Foreign Affairs Prince Faisal bin Farhan held on Thursday a phone call with US Secretary of State Marco Rubio.During the call, they discussed the latest developments in the region in light of the ceasefire reached between the United States of America and Iran. The recent developments in Lebanon and the efforts being made in this regard are also figured in their talks.

items.title: Saudi Arabia surpasses 100% self-sufficiency in key food products, led by dairy, dates, and eggs
items.title_zh: 以乳制品、枣和鸡蛋为首的沙特阿拉伯在关键食品方面超越了100%的自给自足
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi Arabia has attained advanced levels of self-sufficiency across a range of plant and animal food products, surpassing 100 percent in several categories, according to the 2024 Food Security Statistics issued by the General Authority for Statistics (GASTAT). This achievement reflects ongoing efforts to enhance food sustainability and further develop the agricultural sector. The data indicate that self-sufficiency reached 121 percent for dates, 131 percent for dairy products, and 103 percent for table eggs. Additionally, rates stood at 102 percent for okra and 101 percent for cucumbers, underscoring the efficiency of domestic production and its capacity to meet local demand. In the vegetable sector, several crops recorded strong self-sufficiency levels, including 105 percent for eggplant and 100 percent for zucchini, while potatoes reached 93 percent, tomatoes 83 percent and onions 72 percent. Efforts continue to enhance production across other agricultural crops. The data also showed improved self-sufficiency in fruits, with dates at 121 percent, figs at 99 percent, grapes at 65 percent and mangoes at 55 percent alongside varying rates for other fruits, highlighting the diversity of agricultural production in the Kingdom. In the animal products sector, the Kingdom achieved notable self-sufficiency rates, with shrimp reaching 149 percent, dairy products 131 percent and table eggs 103 percent. Poultry meat stood at 72 percent, red meat at 62 percent and fish at 52 percent. The statistics further revealed improvements in several indicators compared to 2023, particularly in self-sufficiency levels for onions, tomatoes, and fish. In addition, per capita annual rice consumption rose to 52.1 kilograms, reflecting enhanced food supply levels. The authority affirmed that these findings are based on comprehensive data encompassing the four key dimensions of food security—availability, access, stability, and utilization—in collaboration with relevant entities, thereby supporting decision-making and strengthening the Kingdom’s food security system.

items.title: Attacks on Saudi energy sites kill one, disrupt East-West pipeline by 700,000 bpd, cut 600,000 bpd output
items.title_zh: 对沙特能源站的袭击造成一人死亡，东西方管道中断70万桶/日，产量减少60万桶/日
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi Arabia’s vital energy facilities have recently come under multiple attacks, targeting oil and gas production, transportation and refining sites, as well as petrochemical and electricity infrastructure in Riyadh, the Eastern Province, and Yanbu Industrial City, an official source at the Ministry of Energy said. The attacks resulted in the death of a Saudi citizen working in industrial security at the Saudi Energy Company, while seven others were injured. Several key operational processes across the energy system were also disrupted. Among the affected facilities was a pumping station on the critical East-West pipeline, leading to the loss of around 700,000 barrels per day in throughput. The pipeline is a key route for supplying global markets during the current period. The Manifa production facility was also targeted, reducing its output by approximately 300,000 barrels per day. A previous attack on the Khurais facility caused a similar decline of 300,000 barrels per day, bringing the Kingdom’s total production capacity loss to around 600,000 barrels per day. The attacks extended to major refining facilities, including SATORP in Jubail, Ras Tanura refinery, SAMREF in Yanbu, and the Riyadh refinery, directly impacting exports of refined products to global markets. Processing facilities in Ju’aymah were also hit by fires, affecting exports of liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) and natural gas liquids. The source warned that continued targeting of energy infrastructure could lead to supply shortages and delay recovery efforts, posing risks to global energy security and increasing volatility in oil markets. The developments have already negatively impacted the global economy, particularly as a significant portion of operational and emergency reserves has been depleted, limiting the ability to respond to supply disruptions

items.title: Saudia to resume flights to Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Amman from April 11
items.title_zh: 沙特航空将于4月11日恢复飞往迪拜、阿布扎比、安曼的航班
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi Arabian Airlines will partially resume operations to and from Dubai, Abu Dhabi and Amman starting Saturday, April 11, the airline announced. The national carrier will operate a set of daily exceptional flights on the following routes: Dubai (DXB): SV588 — Jeddah to Dubai; SV589 — Dubai to Jeddah.Abu Dhabi (AUH): SV570 — Jeddah to Abu Dhabi; SV571 — Abu Dhabi to Jeddah.Amman (AMM): SV631 — Jeddah to Amman; SV632 — Amman to Jeddah. The airline urged passengers to check the status of their flights before heading to the airport. Saudia have halted flights since Feb.28 due to the military escalation in the region.

items.title: Absher introduces seamless online transfer of vehicle number plates
items.title_zh: Absher引入了车牌的无缝在线转账
items.summary: RIYADH — The Traffic Department has introduced an online service enabling vehicle owners to transfer their registration plates without the need to visit its offices. It has urged vehicle owners across various regions and cities in Saudi Arabia to avoid in-person visits for number plate transfers.The department announced that this new service allows vehicle owners to complete the entire process electronically through the Ministry of Interior’s Absher platform. According to the announcement, the service simplifies plate transfers, allowing them to be completed with a single click. It also ensures secure payment, offers the flexibility to complete transactions anytime and anywhere, and provides the option to have the vehicle registration delivered via postal service.To use the electronic service, users begin by selecting the “Services” icon, followed by “Vehicle Management and Plate Transfer,” and then choosing “New Request.” The user then selects the option to transfer plates between their vehicle and another owner’s vehicle, enters the required details of the other party, and pays the applicable fees.The service requires that all outstanding fees be settled, and that both vehicles have valid periodic inspection certificates and insurance. It also requires mutual agreement between the two parties, confirmed by entering and verifying the other party’s information in the system. Once completed, the plates are replaced, and new vehicle registrations are issued, the department revealed.

items.title: GCC seeks permanent solution for regional crisis
items.title_zh: 海湾合作委员会寻求地区危机的永久解决方案
items.summary: RIYADH — The General Secretariat of the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) welcomed the announcement of a ceasefire between the United States of America and Iran.In a statement, the secretariat underlined the significance of concerted regional and international efforts to reach a permanent solution to end this crisis in order to ensure the security and stability of the region and the world.The GCC general secretariat praised the significant efforts exerted by Pakistan as well as those of other regional and international parties in achieving the ceasefire. It called for an end to the ongoing conflict.

items.title: Saudi, Pakistani foreign ministers discuss efforts to restore regional security in phone call
items.title_zh: 沙特、巴基斯坦外长在电话中讨论恢复地区安全的努力
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi Minister of Foreign Affairs Prince Faisal bin Farhan received on Thursday a phone call from Pakistan’s Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs Ishaq Dar. During the call, the ministers discussed regional developments and efforts to restore security and stability in the region.Prince Faisal receives message from Lavrov Also on Thursday, Prince Faisal bin Farhan received a written message from Russian Minister of Foreign Affairs Sergey Lavrov, concerning issues of common interest.Deputy Minister of Foreign Affairs for Multilateral International Affairs Dr. Abdulrahman Al-Rassi received the message from Russian Ambassador to the Kingdom Sergey Kozlov during their meeting in Riyadh. They reviewed the bilateral relations between the two countries and discussed regional and international issues.
